'''Clynn''' was an Imperial [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] and was stationed on [[Kalist VI/Legends|Kalist VI]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].

==Biography==
During his tour at the base, Clynn met a newly rotated-in officer named [[Janek Sunber/Legends|Janek Sunber]], and immediately had a confrontation with him—ostensibly over taking Clynn's bunk, but in reality to show the new 'meat' who was in charge.

Sunber, however, proved more than a match for Clynn's brutish fighting style, earning the lieutenant's respect by standing up for himself and being identified as one of the 'heroes' of [[Maridun/Legends|Maridun]]. Clynn took Sunber under his wing, introducing him to life on the base, and one of the 'perks' of being an officer—being free to take advantage of female prisoners.

After being forced by Sunber—at blaster-point—to release [[Unidentified Jabiimi prisoner|his prisoner]], Clynn reported the incident, minus key details, to their commanding officer, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kale Roshuir]]. This resulted in Sunber being confined to base while its troops were mobilized to investigate a possible [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base in the [[Thila/Legends|Thila]] system.

Accompanying Captain Roshuir to Thila, Clynn was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by a booby trap left behind in the abandoned Rebel base.
